apiContracts.description: Health-check endpoint returning the server process uptime in seconds. Read-only, no side effects. Delegates to UptimeService.getUptime() which wraps process.uptime().

componentSpecs.name: uptimeRoutes
componentSpecs.description: Fastify plugin that registers a GET /uptime route. Instantiates UptimeService and delegates to getUptime(), returning { uptimeSeconds: number } with HTTP 200. Catches errors and returns 500 with { error: string }. Follows the existing module pattern: imports service interface and implementation from the module barrel (index.ts), exports an async plugin function accepting FastifyInstance.
